key_risks: June CPI release on July 14 surprises to the upside, pressuring rate-sensitive growth holdings
July 2 employment report shows weaker-than-expected payrolls, triggering broad equity rotation
Semiconductor sector experiences post-run profit-taking ahead of holiday-shortened trading week

portfolio.rationale: Strong 30-day momentum and exposure to AI supply chain demand likely to persist through July data window.
Factor has shown recent outperformance and benefits from continuation of growth trends into earnings season.
Domestic growth sensitivity and recent relative strength versus large caps ahead of employment and retail data.
Benchmark exposure provides ballast against volatility around CPI and jobs releases.

portfolio_rationale: Concentrated tilt toward momentum and semiconductor exposure to capture near-term growth continuation while retaining benchmark ballast for data-event risk.
rationale_summary: Portfolio favors recent outperformers in semis and momentum for the one-month window, supplemented by small-cap and S&P 500 to balance event-driven volatility.
